title: Define Founder Product Signal Report UI contract and API integration assumptions
objective: Create a durable UI repo contract artifact for the Founder-lens Product Signal Report request, response, report item shape, and API integration assumptions without implementing runtime UI code or changing sibling repositories.

include: Create or update a UI-local planning contract artifact for InsightReportRequest, InsightReportResponse, InsightReportItem, and related UI API integration assumptions.
Document how the future UI contract should preserve existing NoiseCut API and browser extension compatibility.
Document privacy, observability, configuration, feedback, and correlation ID assumptions for future UI implementation.
Keep the work planning/spec-only and inside noise-cut-ui AI delivery artifacts.
exclude: Runtime source files, package manifests, lockfiles, routes, build tools, or dependency changes.
API endpoint, backend DTO, persistence, telemetry exporter, auth, billing, or deployment implementation.
Final endpoint naming decisions that have not been verified and accepted in the API repo.

unknowns: Whether the future API will expose Product Signal Reports through an existing background-job flow, a new report-oriented analysis type, or another thin additive endpoint.
Whether Markdown should be generated by the API or assembled in the UI from structured report fields.
Whether URL-only report generation requires API-side extraction or UI/extension-supplied evidence.
The final name and location of any runtime TypeScript contract file after app scaffold decisions exist.
done: A durable UI-local contract artifact defines InsightReportRequest, InsightReportResponse, InsightReportItem, and related supporting types or fields.
The contract artifact explains API integration assumptions without inventing unverified endpoint names.
The contract artifact documents backward compatibility rules for existing API and extension flows.
The contract artifact documents privacy and observability constraints, including no raw-content logging by default.
No runtime app files, package files, API repo files, or extension repo files were changed.
Validation commands were run or skipped with a documented reason.
.ai/STATE.md was updated with task outcome and remaining risks.
If advanced state is in scope, .ai/state/STATE.md, .ai/state/snapshot.json, and .ai/state/events.jsonl were updated.
